title: Should You Invest in Bitcoin or AI Stocks Right Now?
description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) ran to a new ATH of $126,000 in October 2025 before falling to $62,000 on February 6. Now, BTC trades around $78,000, as the coin struggles against bearish momentum. Meanwhile, AI stocks like NVIDIA (NASDAQ: NVDA) recently peaked at $235 on May 14, before retracing to $224—though the stock still remains up ... Should You Invest in Bitcoin or AI Stocks Right Now?

title: Bitcoin on the Brink of a Knockdown
description: Market Overview The crypto market capitalisation has fallen by 5.2% over the past seven days to $2.56 trillion, with the decline accelerating in the second half of the week.
